Stability AI launches Brand Studio for brand-consistent image generation
summary: Stability AI is going commercial: The new "Brand Studio" lets creative teams generate AI visuals that match their brand identity, using custom-trained models, automated production workflows, and precision image editing tools. title: Conflicting Rulings Leave Anthropic in ‘Supply-Chain Risk’ Limbo
summary: A US appeals court ruling is at odds with a separate, lower court decision from March, leaving uncertainty about if and how the US military can use the AI company's Claude model.
